philippines.title: ArenaPlus to welcome back Derrick Rose in Manila for exciting announcement
philippines.description:
Former Chicago Bulls legend Derrick Rose is set to return to the Philippines for the second time in seven months as his ArenaPlus family welcomes him back for another landmark event on April 11 at the SM Mall of Asia Music Hall. Coming off a landmark partnership signing last September, Rose will be the top attraction at the Pasay City venue in what promises to be an action-packed afternoon, as fans gear up for the 2026 Playoffs, kicking off on April 15. The event comes shortly after ArenaPlus revealed its Playoffs MVP: Battle for the Most Valuable Predictor free-to-play bracket […]...
Keep on reading: ArenaPlus to welcome back Derrick Rose in Manila for exciting announcement

philippines.title: UAAP: UP stays in Final Four hunt, sweeps Ateneo
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — University of the Philippines kept its Final Four hopes alive after sweeping the also-ran Ateneo, 25-20, 25-14, 25-23, in the UAAP Season 88 women’s volleyball tournament on Wednesday at Mall of Asia Arena. The Fighting Maroons completed an elimination round sweep of the Blue Eagles, as UP refused to play another set when Ateneo held a 23-21 lead in the third after Alex Montoro’s attack.  Niña Ytang nailed a quick attack and an ace to tie the frame before Bienne Bansil blocked Montoro for match point, 24-23. Ytang drilled the game-winning ace for an improved 5-6 record […]...
Keep on reading: UAAP: UP stays in Final Four hunt, sweeps Ateneo

entertainment.description: “Sirens,” the latest film from Alexandra Latishev Salazar, director of Costa Rican Oscar entry “Medea,” has been boarded by Vitrine Filmes España.  The San Sebastián-based production-distribution arm of Brazil’s Vitrine Filmes, Vitrine España will produce “Sirens” (“Sirenas”) with Costa Rica’s La Linterna Films, headed by Latishev and director-producer  Federico Montero, as well as Pacifica Grey, […]
